who: HR payroll teams in accounting firms processing 5–15 expense reports/month
offer: For HR payroll teams in accounting firms processing 5–15 expense reports/month, manual report generation causes delays in reimbursements. We streamline report generation instead of manual report generation using spreadsheets.
problem: Manual generation of expense reimbursement reports leads to delays.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for HR payroll teams
Indie Hackers posts about similar workflows
DM outreach to HR payroll teams with demo video
Community forums where HR payroll teams share tools
try_it: Let users try user-friendly report generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing manual workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant communities
